title: festuca duriuscula var. pallens
intro: Festuca duriuscula var. pallens, also known as a type of grass or a variant of the alpine fescue, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Festuca duriuscula var. pallens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve breathing, and provide relief from coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
